a:r.a:t: • Auto-ingests tickets, emails, alerts, and Teams inputs• Classifies intent, priority, ticket type, and affected journey• Recommends category, SOP, runbook, and resolver group• Detects P1 signals and triggers HITL escalation• Enriches L2 handoff with RCA draft, logs, and related history• Auto-drafts stakeholder updates, ticket notes, and closure summaries
Incidents are logged through Help Desk, email, phone, or alerts and manually reviewed by L1 for categorization, priority, SOP lookup, assignment, escalation, and closure documentation.
Auto-ingests tickets, emails, alerts, and Teams inputs
Classifies intent, priority, ticket type, and affected journey
Recommends category, SOP, runbook, and resolver group
Detects P1 signals and triggers HITL escalation
Enriches L2 handoff with RCA draft, logs, and related history
Auto-drafts stakeholder updates, ticket notes, and closure summaries
